examples.title: Distance vs Time
examples.content: Plot a journey: 0 sec → 0 m, 5 sec → 50 m, 10 sec → 100 m. Graph shows a straight line. Easy to see the pattern.

examples.title: Temperature Over a Day
examples.content: Record temperature every hour. 6am → 10°C, noon → 20°C, 6pm → 18°C, midnight → 8°C. Graph shows the pattern without reading numbers.

examples.title: Speed vs Fuel Efficiency
examples.content: Slower car = better mpg, faster car = worse mpg. Graph shows the relationship instantly. Points scattered, not perfectly linear.
